case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. MICHELLE BROUGHTON

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BROUGHTON, MICHELLE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2018

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100025624) AS TO DEFENDANT BROUGHTON, MICHELLE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100025286), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED SEP-21-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROUGHTON, MICHELLE
